pr.title: Record: Score-First TTT + N-gram Backoff (3-seed mean val_bpb=0.9581)

output.summary: Combines Score-First TTT on sequential val chunks with entropy-adaptive multi-order n-gram backoff atop an 11-layer gated-attention/U-Net skip architecture.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT trains on validation tokens (scored under inference_mode) before including them in training, so the run uses only validation shards.
techniques: Score-First TTT on sequential val chunks
Gated attention/VR with U-Net skip connections
